title: Silent Symphony

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The heavens sing their silent song
Through starlit symphonies so strong
Each dawn declares a story new
As glory paints the morning dew

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Creation speaks without a sound
Your wisdom echoes all around
From east to west, from earth to sky
Your beauty makes the spirit fly

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Perfect law that guides our way
Like golden light in breaking day
Your truth refreshes weary souls
Your wisdom makes the broken whole

sections.label: Bridge
lines: More precious than the finest gold
More sweet than honey, new or old
Your words are life, Your truth divine
Let every heartbeat fall in line

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Cleanse my heart of hidden ways
Let truth illuminate my days
May all my words and thoughts align
With Your design, Your grand design

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Creation speaks without a sound
Your wisdom echoes all around
My Rock, Redeemer, guiding light
Lead me from dawn through darkest night

epigraph: The law of the LORD is perfect
